completion_summary: Audited all 28 interactive operation semantics; aligned Task Lab inputs with effective runtime bounds and supported categories; added public transaction deltas and state-faithful student animations; changed Agent spectra to explicit ID-based retrieval with provenance and resource accounting; neutralized strategy-leading prompts; corrected student spectrum channel summaries and SSE completion behavior. Full suite: 1108 passed, 14 skipped; real DeepSeek Pro run verified two explicit HPLC retrievals without automatic reuse.
notes: Do not alter frozen benchmark scoring or world-law contracts. UI animation must derive from public executed state/events and must not imply unobserved chemistry. Spectrum retrieval must preserve disclosure and experiment provenance.
scope: Audit hidden state/effect mismatches across interactive operations; replace automatic model spectrum delivery with explicit retrieval; expand student laboratory animation with state-faithful process feedback and neutral prompts
